But the initial green dot position was rows 40-41, cols 10-11, which is offset (2, 2) from the top-left corner.
So I need to move the green dot from offset (4, 4) to offset (2, 2). That's UP 2, LEFT 2.

- Red bar horizontal (rows 30-33, cols 12-17)

- Green dot at offset (4, 4)
So the left panel configuration matches the initial state, but the green dot is at a different position. Maybe the goal is to move the green dot to offset (2, 2).
Let me move the green dot to offset (2, 2) and see if the level completes.
